nodes.name: Webhook: /getoutloop-audit
nodes.notes: Receives POST from /audit page. Fields: name, email, company, website, tier (free|pro|complete), message, timestamp, source

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Log Audit Request
nodes.notes: Columns: Row_ID | Timestamp | Name | Email | Company | Website | Tier | Message | Source | Status | Score | Grade | Report_Sent_At

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check — Same Email 30 Days
nodes.notes: Check if this email already has an audit in the last 30 days. If yes, branch to rate-limit response.

nodes.name: IF Router — Free vs PRO/Complete
nodes.notes: TRUE → Free audit path. FALSE → PRO/Complete audit path.

nodes.name: Claude API — Free Audit (Sonnet)
nodes.notes: Model: claude-sonnet-4-6. Returns JSON with overall_score, grade, summary, critical_issues[5].

nodes.name: Claude API — Full 8-Section Audit (Sonnet)
nodes.notes: Model: claude-sonnet-4-6, max_tokens: 8000. Returns full 8-section audit JSON.

nodes.name: Claude Haiku — Free Email HTML

jsonBody.system: You generate professional HTML email bodies for GEO audit reports. Use inline CSS only. Dark theme: background #0A0E27, text #B0B8C8, white for headings, #00A8FF for electric blue accents, #00FF9D for neon green. Mobile-friendly. No external fonts or images. Return raw HTML only — no markdown, no code fences.

messages.content:
Generate a GEO Free Audit email for:
- Name: {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.name }}
- Website: {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }}
- Audit JSON: {{ JSON.stringify($('Claude API — Free Audit (Sonnet)').item.json.content[0].text) }}

Email must include:
1. Header: GetOutLoop logo text + tagline 'Get Cited by AI. Get Found by Everyone.'
2. Greeting: 'Hi [Name], your free GEO Audit for [website] is ready.'
3. Score display: large score number + grade letter (color-coded: A/B=#00FF9D, C=#00A8FF, D/F=#FF5050)
4. Summary paragraph
5. Top 5 Critical Issues table: Issue | Severity (color-coded badge) | Business Impact
6. Upgrade CTA box: 'Want the full 8-section report with fix guides? Upgrade to GEO PRO.' Button: 'View Pricing' linking to https://getoutloop.com/pricing
7. Footer: GetOutLoop | support@getoutloop.com | https://getoutloop.com | Unsubscribe

nodes.notes: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 — 25x cheaper than Sonnet for HTML formatting only. Returns mobile-friendly inline-CSS HTML.

nodes.name: Claude Sonnet — PRO Report Markdown

jsonBody.system: You convert GEO audit JSON data into a professional HTML report for PDF generation. Use inline CSS. Professional design: white background #FFFFFF, dark navy headings #0A0E27, electric blue #00A8FF accents, neon green #00FF9D for passing scores. Include: cover page, executive summary, 8 scored sections with findings and issues, priority action matrix table, methodology note. Return raw HTML only — no markdown, no code fences.

messages.content:
Generate a full GEO {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.tier.toUpperCase() }} Report HTML for:
- Client: {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.name }} ({{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.company || $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }})
- Website: {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }}
- Audit Date: {{ $now.format('MMMM D, YYYY') }}
- Audit JSON: {{ JSON.stringify($('Claude API — Full 8-Section Audit (Sonnet)').item.json.content[0].text) }}

Report sections:
1. Cover page: GetOutLoop logo text, 'GEO Audit Report', client name, website, date, tier badge
2. Executive Summary with overall score gauge visual (CSS circle) and grade
3. Section scores table: all 8 dimensions with score/max, status badge, key findings
4. Each dimension detail: score bar, findings list, issues with severity badges
5. Priority Action Matrix table: Rank | Action | Impact | Effort | Timeline | Dimension
6. Methodology: brief explanation of 8-dimension GEO audit framework
7. Footer: Prepared by GetOutLoop | getoutloop.com | support@getoutloop.com | Confidential

nodes.notes: Generates full HTML report for PDFShift conversion. PRO and Complete tiers.

nodes.name: PDFShift — HTML to PDF
nodes.notes: PDFShift API at $9/mo for 50 PDFs. Returns binary PDF. Auth: HTTP Basic with api_key as username, empty password.

nodes.name: Telegram — HITL Review (PRO/Complete)
nodes.notes: Sends PDF to Telegram for manual review. 2-hour Wait node auto-approves.

nodes.name: Wait — 2hr Auto-Approve
nodes.notes: 2-hour window for manual Telegram review. After timeout, auto-proceeds to email send.

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Free Audit Email

parameters.subject: Your Free GEO Audit — {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }} (Score: {{ JSON.parse($('Claude API — Free Audit (Sonnet)').item.json.content[0].text).overall_score }}/100)

nodes.notes: Sends HTML-only email for Free tier. No PDF attachment.

nodes.name: Gmail — Send PRO Report + PDF

parameters.subject: Your GEO {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.tier.toUpperCase() }} Audit Report — {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.name }},

Your GEO {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.tier.toUpperCase() }} Audit Report for {{ $('Webhook: /getoutloop-audit').item.json.website }} is attached as a PDF.

Overall Score: {{ JSON.parse($('Claude API — Full 8-Section Audit (Sonnet)').item.json.content[0].text).overall_score }}/100

Review the Priority Action Matrix on page 5 — that's your implementation roadmap.

Reply to this email if you have questions.

Ronnel Besagre
GetOutLoop | getoutloop.com

nodes.notes: Sends email with PDF attachment for PRO/Complete tier.

nodes.name: Google Drive — Save PDF Report
nodes.notes: Saves PDF to Google Drive folder for client record-keeping.

meta.description: GetOutLoop self-service GEO audit pipeline. Free tier: Claude Sonnet audit → Claude Haiku email HTML → Gmail. PRO/Complete tier: Claude Sonnet full 8-section audit → Claude Sonnet HTML report → PDFShift PDF → Telegram HITL (2hr auto-approve) → Gmail with attachment → Google Drive save.

credentials_required: Google Sheets OAuth2 — connect your Google account
Google Drive OAuth2 — same Google account as Sheets
PDFShift HTTP Basic Auth — api_key as username, empty password
_setup_notes.google_drive_folder: Create a folder named 'GEO Audit Reports' in Drive and paste its folder ID
_setup_notes.pdfshift_plan: $9/mo Basic — 50 PDFs/mo. Upgrade to $29/mo Growth for 250 PDFs when PRO subscribers exceed ~20.
_setup_notes.webhook_url_for_audit_form: Copy the production webhook URL from n8n and paste into GetOutLoop-GEO AGENCY/app/audit/page.tsx WEBHOOK_URL constant
_setup_notes.rate_limit_node: node-2b-rate-limit is a reference node — implement as a Code node or IF node comparing lastAuditDate to $now.minus(30, 'days')
